name: Melon, Hearts of Palm, and Prosciutto Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a salad bowl, combine the Mesclun salad mix (or mixed greens), hearts of palm, diced cantaloupe, and Prosciutto (or boiled ham).
2. Drizzle with red-wine vinaigrette.
3. Toss gently until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
